temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) In a dimly lit, dark room, a man with a goatee and a dark suit brings a cigarette to his lips, the bright lighter illuminating his face. The scene then cuts to another man in a suit and glasses, who is handed a cigarette by the first man. The second man takes it and brings it to his own lips, preparing to light it. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a tense and clandestine atmosphere, suggesting a meeting between two important characters. The act of sharing a cigarette implies a shared secret or alliance.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score plays, heightening the tension.)
